Jessica Turner
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Dedicated and detail-oriented warehouse associate with over three years of experience in fast-paced environments. Proven ability to meet strict deadlines while maintaining accuracy in order fulfillment. Strong physical stamina and a commitment to workplace safety, looking to contribute to a productive team as a Picker/Packer.

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently pick and pack orders for shipment, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.
- Operate hand trucks and pallet jacks to transport goods throughout the warehouse.
- Maintain cleanliness and organization of workstations and storage areas.
- Collaborate with team members to achieve daily productivity goals.

Warehouse Worker  
XYZ Distribution, Tempe, AZ  
January 2019 - May 2021  
- Assisted in receiving and sorting incoming shipments, checking for discrepancies.
- Loaded and unloaded trucks, ensuring proper handling of packages weighing up to 50 lbs.
- Conducted regular inventory checks and reported stock levels to management.
- Gained experience in operating various warehouse equipment and tools.
